description: As a lab technician needing a custom tray for a final denture impression, design a custom impression tray for the edentulous maxilla model located at 'C:\workspace\data\stl\maxilla_edentulous.stl'. The tray must cover the entire ridge and palate, utilizing a 2.0 mm spacer/offset and a 2.0 mm thickness. Include an outward-angled handle in the anterior midline region. Save the completed project to 'C:\workspace\data\output\custom_tray_case.bsp'.
